Layer.Name: Deposits_zoom
Layer.Title: Metal deposits - outline
Layer.Abstract: Metal deposits - outline. Not sorted on commodity types. Points.

Layer.Name: Deposit_importance
Layer.Title: Metal deposits of public importance
Layer.Abstract: Metal deposits of public importance. Polygons.

Layer.Title: Base metal deposits, prospects and occurrences
Layer.Abstract: Base metal deposits, prospects and occurrences

Layer.Title: Ferrous metal deposits, prospects and occurrences
Layer.Abstract: Ferrous metal deposits, prospects and occurrences

Layer.Name: Titanium
Layer.Title: Titanium
Layer.Abstract: Titanium; Rutile, anatas, ilmenite, titanite, sphene

Layer.Name: Ferroalloys
Layer.Title: Ferroalloys
Layer.Abstract: Ferroalloys - occurrence type and commodity type.

Layer.Name: Precious_metals
Layer.Title: Precious metals
Layer.Abstract: Precious metals - occurrence type and commodity type.

Layer.Name: PGE
Layer.Title: PGE - Platinum group elements
Layer.Abstract: PGE - Platinum group elements (rhutenium, rhodium, palladium, osmium, iridium and platinum)

Layer.Name: Energy_metals
Layer.Title: Energy metals
Layer.Abstract: Energy metals - occurrence type and commodity type.

Layer.Name: Special_metals
